title: Identify amplitude and vertical shift
text: For a sinusoidal function $$f(t)$$ $$=$$ $$A\sin(Bt)$$ + $$D$$, $$the$$ $$amplitude$$ $$is$$ $$|A|$$ and the vertical shift is $$D$$. $$The$$ $$range$$ $$of$$ $$the$$ $$function$$ $$is$$ $$(D-\$\$|A|$$, D+$$|A|$$)$$.

title: Identify A and D
text: What are the values of A and $$D$$ in the function $$f(t)=20\sin(160\pi$$ t)+100$$?
